javadoc_before:
/**
 * Iterator exposed by {@link ObjectMapper} when binding sequence of
 * objects. Extension is done to allow more convenient access
 * (in Jackson 2.x exception handling required it, too, but not in 3.x)

javadoc_after:
/** * Iterator exposed by {@link ObjectMapper} when binding sequence of * objects. Extension is done to allow more convenient access to some * aspects of databinding, such as current location (see {@link #currentLocation()}. *

* NOTE: in Jackson 2.x exception handling required use of this class in many case * (due to Jackson 2.x API exposing checked exceptions) but this is no longer * necessary with Jackson 3.x. */
